title: AUP Learning Cloud Runtime Status
description: Settings for the runtime countdown shown in the JupyterLab status bar.

template.title: Status Text Template
template.description: Text template rendered with runtime status tokens.

hideWhenUnavailable.title: Hide When Unavailable
hideWhenUnavailable.description: Hide the status item when runtime metadata is missing or invalid.

hideWhenUnlimited.title: Hide When Unlimited
hideWhenUnlimited.description: Hide the status item when the session has no runtime limit.

updateIntervalMs.title: Update Interval
updateIntervalMs.description: How often the status item refreshes, in milliseconds.
